journal_entry.reason: Materials purchased for R&D use are expensed immediately per IAS 38.126. Payment by cheque reduces cash.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Mondelez purchased raw materials specifically for R&D purposes. Under IFRS (IAS 38.126), materials purchased for research and development use must be expensed when acquired, not capitalized to inventory. The transaction explicitly states the materials are for R&D of a new snack product, so the correct treatment is to recognize an R&D expense. Payment was made by cheque, reducing cash. No tax was mentioned in the transaction, so no tax lines are included.
